temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A close-up shot reveals a silver Motorola flip phone. The screen lights up with a new message notification. The message, written in Chinese characters, reads '新消息: 445544887700' (New Message: 445544887700). The time displayed is 11:12. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately introduces a key element: a mysterious and urgent message. The number '445544887700' is highlighted, suggesting it is significant to the plot.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A distinct notification chime sound effect plays.)
(00:02-00:04) A man in a grey suit and light-colored shirt stands in a dimly lit, tiled room, smiling as he looks down at his phone. The scene then cuts to a dark, cluttered office where a person in a black shirt is seen from behind, looking at a computer monitor. (Storyline: The scene introduces two different settings and characters, creating a sense of parallel action. The man's smile suggests he is pleased with the message, while the office scene hints at a more clandestine or investigative activity.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Upbeat, rhythmic electronic music begins to play, setting a tense and fast-paced mood.)
(00:05-00:07) In the dark office, a man in a black shirt and tie stands up, turns towards the camera, and shouts with a serious expression. The office is filled with computer monitors, one of which shows a blue-tinted image. (Storyline: The man's shout interrupts the quiet tension, signaling a shift in the situation. His authoritative tone suggests he is in charge or has discovered something important.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Authoritative, loud, and commanding. 2) Background sounds or music: The rhythmic electronic music continues.)
